---
title: "Contact"
---

Thank you for visiting my portfolio.

I’m always happy to connect with professionals, recruiters, classmates, and collaborators.

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i>

## Email

[alinayanxi@gmail.com](mailto:alinayanxi@gmail.com)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
<i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i>

## LinkedIn

[Connect with me](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alina-chen)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
<i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i>

## GitHub

[View my GitHub](https://github.com/alinayanxi)
:::

:::

## Areas of Interest

::: {.interest-tags}
<span>Market Intelligence</span>
<span>Business Analytics</span>
<span>Marketing Strategy</span>
<span>Business Development</span>
<span>Customer Insights</span>
:::
